framework.name: Mutual Authentication as Multi-Agent Prerequisite
framework.description: Frames agent-to-agent communication as requiring mutual authentication beyond channel security — agents must verify they represent who they claim. This is the hop-2 problem restated as identity verification rather than authorization delegation.
framework.raw_quote: Securing communication channels is not enough; agents must also verify that they authentically represent the users or organizations they claim to represent.

source.title: Authenticated Delegation and Authorized AI Agents - arXiv
